2026-04-24T16:29:59.3835400Z [36;1m# Derive GH_HOST from GITHUB_SERVER_URL so the gh CLI targets the correct[0m
2026-04-24T16:29:59.3836914Z [36;1m# GitHub instance (GHES/GHEC). On github.com this is a harmless no-op.[0m
2026-04-24T16:29:59.3837722Z [36;1mGH_HOST="${GITHUB_SERVER_URL#https://}"[0m
